privileged_info_summary: Charlotte's Web is by E.B. White and features main characters Wilbur (pig), Charlotte (spider), and Fern (girl). The book's typical reading level is Lexile 680L with an Accelerated Reader level of 4.4, making it most appropriate for 4th-5th grade independent reading, though it can be read aloud to 3rd graders. The task requires creating a 4-page ActivInspire flipchart containing the book title, three comprehension questions, three labeled character boxes (rectangles), and theme/message prompts, saved as charlottes_web_guide.flipchart in /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts.
